channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: College hoops is full of versatile big men who could bust brackets in March Madness
item.description: Danny Wolf moves with the freedom of a guard in a 7-footer's body, bursting off screens for catch-and-shoot 3-pointers, beating defenders off the dribble, using his vision to find open teammates over smaller players.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Knight, Coyne Schofield lead mix of experience, youth on US women world hockey championship roster
item.description: The United States is bringing a mix of familiar faces and youth to the women’s world hockey championship tournament in the Czech Republic next month.
item.dc:creator: John Wawrow, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: 7 stand trial over cyber death threats against Paris Olympics artistic director
item.description: PARIS (AP) — The trial of seven people charged in connection with alleged cyberbullying targeting the artistic director of last summer’s Paris Olympics’ opening and closing ceremonies has started in a Paris court.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Panthers stay active at NHL trade deadline by getting goalie Vitek Vanecek from the Sharks
item.description: The defending Stanley Cup champion Florida Panthers continue to be active in the leadup to the NHL trade deadline. The Panthers acquired goaltender Vitek Vanecek on Wednesday from the San Jose Sharks for 25-year-old forward Patrick Giles, the teams announced.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Reports: Bears trade for all-pro Chiefs OL Joe Thuney
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. — The Bears have reportedly traded for four-time Super Bowl champion guard Joe Thuney from the Chiefs. According to multiple reports, the Bears are sending back a 2026 fourth-round pick for the 32-year-old guard.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Emma Raducanu says she struggled to breathe after seeing 'fixated' man in the crowd
item.description: INDIAN WELLS, Calif. (AP) — Emma Raducanu says she “couldn't see the ball through tears” and struggled to breathe after spotting a man who was “fixated” on her during a match. The British tennis player and 2021 U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: LeBron James becomes first player in NBA to score 50K combined points
item.description: LeBron James is well on his way to rewriting every previous definition of basketball longevity, and the 40-year-old star is now racking up numbers the NBA has never seen before.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Top NFL Draft prospect Travis Hunter’s stance on 2-way difficulty criticized by Shannon Sharpe, Chad Johnson
item.description: A pair of former NFL stars took aim at Travis Hunter's position that what he does as a two-way player was more challenging than what Shohei Ohtani does in baseball.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bruins trade big forward Trent Frederic to the Oilers in a 3-team deal with the Devils
item.description: The defending Western Conference champion Edmonton Oilers made their first big move ahead of the NHL trade deadline Tuesday, acquiring hard-nosed forward Trent Frederic from the Boston Bruins.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 49ers donate $20K in equipment to 3 Santa Clara high schools
item.description: (KRON) -- Students and athletes at three Santa Clara high schools will be stepping up their game after the San Francisco 49ers recently donated more than $20,000 worth of workout and football training equipment.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, KRON4

item.title: ACC, Clemson, Florida State approve settlement to end legal fight, change revenue-distribution model
item.description: The Atlantic Coast Conference, Clemson and Florida State are ready to move forward together after legal fights that threatened the stability of the league.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Shoeless Joe Jackson's personal scrapbooks hit auction
item.description: There are about 118 pages in the scrapbook that contain various newspaper articles, box scores, summaries of baseball games and photographs of Jackson mounted to the pages.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, NewsNation

item.title: Gerlinde Kaltenbrunner climbed the world's 14 highest peaks without oxygen or porters
item.description: Gerlinde Kaltenbrunner, an Austrian-born mountaineer, became the first woman to climb the world's 14 highest peaks without the help of oxygen or porters.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Bay Hill broadcast to feature few commercial and more player-caddie chatter
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — The Arnold Palmer Invitational will have fewer commercials and more emphasis on data and player-caddie interactions as part of a pilot program a key sponsor has endorsed.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jordan Howlett, of the Fast Foods Secrets Club, returns to Oceanside High School
item.description: You may have seen Oceanside alum Jordan Howlett before while scrolling through your social media feed. Telling his over 25 million viewers on Instagram and TikTok to, "Come here," before he reveals the secret recipes of everyone's fast food favorites as part of his Fast Food Secrets Club.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Bears prospects to watch at the NFL Scouting Combine: Offensive line
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS, Ind. (WGN) — It's the final day of workouts at the NFL Scouting Combine, and Sunday's position group is the one with the most buzz around them when it comes to the Chicago Bears—offensive line.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: San Diego FC makes its home debut before a sellout crowd in a city hungry for top-level soccer
item.description: A match decades in the making finally happens Saturday night when San Diego FC debuts on its home field in front of a sellout crowd of fans starved for elite professional sports — and particularly hungry for top-level soccer.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Going through the NFL combine, Jack Bech inspired by brother killed in New Orleans attack
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Jack Bech grew up in Lafayette, Louisiana, hoping to emulate his older brother. It didn't matter he was playing football games against Tiger's friends, most of whom were five or six years older, significantly bigger and more polished players than he was.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Lee Kunzman, 'persistent' Indy 500 veteran, dies at 80
item.description: Kunzman's best finish in his INDYCAR SERIES career was in 1979, when he placed second at Atlanta Motor Speedway. It was just a narrow loss to winner Johnny Rutherford, IMS officials said.
item.dc:creator: Cooper Hudson, Fox 5

item.title: Angelo Posada, The Titan of the Titans
item.description: "Those who stay will be champions" - that's the motto of Poway Wrestling; one they adopted from Michigan Football under that was adopted under legendary head Coach Bo Schembechler. That motto rings true for the five-time state champion Titans, who have won 44 CIF SDS titles in the last 47 years.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Bountiful 3-peats with another 5A state title
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Bountiful girls basketball team has built a true dynasty. The Redhawks knocked off previously undefeated West High to win its third straight state championship Friday night at the Huntsman Center, 57-47.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Real Salt Lake seeks redemption in MLS home opener against Seattle Sounders
item.description: After a humbling early exit in the CONCACAF Champions Cup at the hands of Herediano, Real Salt Lake looks to hit the reset button ahead of their 2025 MLS regular season opener against the Seattle Sounders.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, Royal Riot Pod, ABC 4

item.title: Utah wins third straight, dominating Minnesota, 6-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Clayton Keller tallied a career-high five points (one goal, four assists) and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Minnesota Wild 6-1 at Delta Center on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
